description: Get dressed in these heels from catwalk. The metal clasped bow lends a dose of chic style to your appearance, making this pair a must have in your wardrobe.UpperPatent leather uppers for comfort and durabilityMetal clasped fabric bow for added styleFabric lining and light cushioning for extra comfortMidsoleLeather lined ergonomic footbed for added style and comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with heelTextured pattern on the forefoot and heel for better gripshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierDo not store in direct sunlight
